channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Philippines: Government to Contract PUVs, Subsidize Fuel Costs Through 2026
item.description: The Philippine government is implementing a new program to ensure the continued operation of public utility vehicles (PUVs) and alleviate the impact of rising fuel prices. Under the plan, the governme...

item.title: Analysis of U.S.-Iran Conflict: Limited Military Gains and Unmet Goals
item.description: After more than five weeks of military conflict and a subsequent two-week ceasefire, the U.S. war with Iran has largely failed to achieve its stated objectives. President Trump's goals included ending...

item.title: UK reveals Russian submarine operation targeting undersea cables, warns of consequences
item.description: The UK has exposed a covert Russian operation targeting vital undersea cables and pipelines in British waters. Over a month, Russia deployed a nuclear-powered submarine and two spy subs from its deep-...

item.title: Max Verstappen may face challenges as key engineer Lambiase moves to McLaren
item.description: Max Verstappen’s long-time race engineer, Gianpiero Lambiase, is reportedly set to leave Red Bull and join McLaren in a senior position, potentially starting in 2028. Lambiase, who has been with Verst...

item.title: Apple's Foldable iPhone Launch Expected in September, Production Challenges Remain
item.description: According to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, Apple’s highly anticipated foldable iPhone is still slated for a September unveiling, coinciding with the release of the iPhone 18 Pro lineup. This news follows a...

item.title: KUCCPS Portal Now Open for University and TVET Applications
item.description: The Kenya Universities and Colleges Central Placement Service (KUCCPS) has opened its portal for over 980,000 students who sat the 2025 Kenya Certificate of Secondary Education (KCSE) examinations. St...

item.title: Nigeria’s NISO Reports Significant Reduction in Electricity Transmission Losses
item.description: Omo, una good news! The Nigerian Independent System Operator (NISO) don announce say transmission losses for our electricity grid don drop to 7.05 percent. Before now, na serious problem, with losses ...

item.title: PUV Drivers to Receive Subsidy and Payments as Marcos Launches Service Contracting Program
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. announced the rollout of an expanded service contracting program and fuel subsidy to aid public utility vehicle (PUV) operators and drivers struggling with high fuel pri...

item.title: Amit Shah Highlights Importance of Navkar Mantra in Promoting Peace During Global Conflicts
item.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah addressed the 'Vishwa Navkar Mahamantra Diwas' in New Delhi and emphasised the significance of collective chanting of the Navkar Mantra for global welfare. He stated that...

item.title: The Rise of the Second Kitchen in Modern Australian Homes
item.description: In 2026, the concept of a second kitchen is gaining traction among Australian homeowners and renovators. Once a feature reserved for grand homes to keep silverware and cooking separate, second kitchen...

item.title: China fires flares at Philippine Coast Guard aircraft over disputed reefs
item.description: On April 9, 2026, Chinese forces fired flares at a Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) aircraft conducting routine monitoring flights over Panganiban (Mischief) and Zamora (Subi) Reefs in the West Philippine...

item.title: California Court Orders Public Release of Warrants in Riverside Ballot Seizure Investigation
item.description: A California court has ordered the public release of warrants used by Riverside County Sheriff Chad Bianco to seize over 650,000 ballots during an investigation into alleged election fraud from the 20...

item.title: Top 8 Face Cleansers for Different Skin Types in 2026
item.description: As skincare continues to evolve, finding the right face cleanser is essential for healthy skin in 2026. This article highlights some of the top face cleansers for various skin concerns, including dry,...

item.title: Bauchi APC Caucus Rejects Governor Bala Mohammed's Planned Defection to the Party
item.description: Supporters of Bauchi State Governor, Bala Mohammed, are pushing hard to make him defect from the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) to the All Progressives Congress (APC) ahead of the 2027 elections. Howe...

item.title: A Debate on Mixing Gold and Silver Jewellery in a Relationship
item.description: Alda and Rachel, a couple with a fifteen-year age difference, are at odds over jewellery choices. Alda believes that mixing metals and inexpensive pieces with valuable gold looks chaotic and cheap, es...

item.title: Israeli Airstrikes on Lebanon Threaten Pakistan‑Brokered US–Iran Ceasefire
item.description: Israel carried out its most intense and coordinated air assault on Lebanon since the start of the US–Iran conflict, reportedly killing over 250 people on Wednesday. The strikes have raised fears that ...

item.title: Global Markets React to Unstable Iran Ceasefire as Oil Prices Climb
item.description: Oil prices surged above $97 a barrel on Thursday amid renewed instability in the Middle East, following skepticism surrounding a fragile two-week ceasefire between the United States and Iran. The conc...

item.title: Ontario School Board Supervisors Bill Varying Fees and Expenses, with Some Charging HST
item.description: Ontario's education ministry has appointed supervisors to oversee school boards struggling with financial and governance issues. However, invoices obtained by Global News reveal that the supervisors a...

item.title: CNBC Host Criticized for Comments on Trump's Threats to Iran and Investor Risk
item.description: A CNBC financial news anchor, Sara Eisen, is facing widespread criticism for her comments regarding President Donald Trump's alarming threats against Iran. Trump, posting on Truth Social, warned of th...

item.title: Life and Resilience Around Kazakhstan’s Former Soviet Nuclear Test Site
item.description: The article explores daily life and collective resilience among residents of villages near the former Semipalatinsk nuclear test site, known as the Polygon, in eastern Kazakhstan. Once the core of the...
